case_title: RACHEL ADAMS VS. ELI LILLY AND COMPANY, AN INDIANA CORPORATION et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PROOF OF SERVICE ON JUN-20-2006 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
